_todo_network: TODO: confirm naming for Base mainnet deployment
_todo_tnt_sentinel: TODO: 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000001 is a sentinel meaning 'use the deployed/reused TNT token' (FullDeploy replaces it at runtime)
_todo_roles: TODO: set multisig / safe addresses for admin, treasury, timelock, and multisig role holders. timelock MUST be the TangleTimelock proxy from script/DeployGovernance.s.sol (deploy governance FIRST).

core._todo_core_addresses: TODO: set core proxies if reusing existing contracts
core._note_minOperatorStake: Anti-sybil native-TNT bond floor (single-bond-asset model: the operator bond is always TNT). Raised 2 TNT -> 1000 TNT. Per-blueprint getMinOperatorStake remains the real value-at-risk lever.
core._todo_tnt_token: TODO: point to canonical TNT token on Base

_todo_stake_assets: TODO: replace placeholder token/adapter addresses with canonical Base deployments before enabling any 0x0 asset. rewardMultiplierBps is flattened to 10000 (1.0x) for ALL assets: the field is currently write-only/unread in reward math and the previous non-flat schedule was risk-ASCENDING (paid more for riskier LSTs) — a latent landmine a future wiring PR would activate verbatim. Reintroduce non-flat values only with USD normalization behind a joint re-audit.
_todo_deposit_policy: TODO: adjust deposit caps as the protocol scales. stETH+wstETH share the same Lido underlying — treat their caps as one family budget (15k each => 30k aggregate). Gate any 0x0-asset enablement on real Base address + adapter.

incentives._todo_tnt_token: TODO: confirm TNT token used for inflation funding
incentives._note_inflation: FIXED SUPPLY at the normalized 100,000,000 TNT target (TangleToken.MAX_SUPPLY). Genesis mints the entire cap across the 4 migration buckets, so the InflationPool can never mint — 'inflation' is treasury-funded emission, not new supply. year1FundTnt = 1% of MAX_SUPPLY = exactly 1,000,000 TNT, pre-funded from the Treasury bucket (~35.64M after normalize-down) via InflationPool.fund(). At a flat 1% that reserve lasts ~35yr; a declining schedule (e.g. Y2 0.8x, Y3 0.6x) stretches it further. Funding is a post-deploy treasury action, not done by the deploy script.
incentives._note_weights: Reroute toward the security layer vs genesis design: stakingBps 5000->5500, developersBps 1500->1000 (donor; developer rewards are ADMIN-allowlist gated, not sybil-farmable). stakersBps stays 0 at genesis — the exposure-weighted rail no-ops until ServiceFeeDistributor + keeper + live services exist; pre-commit a governance migration to staking 3500 / stakers 1500 once that path is live.

_note_governance_slashing_payments: These three blocks are consumed by deploy/deploy-all.sh (the prod orchestrator) AFTER core deploy. governance -> script/DeployGovernance.s.sol (deploy Timelock+Governor, then put the Timelock address in roles.timelock). slashing -> Tangle.setSlashConfig. payments -> Tangle.setPaymentSplit. Without these steps mainnet ships the insecure hardcoded defaults (maxSlashBps=100%, disputeBond=0, keeperBps=0). See deploy/MAINNET-PARAMETERS.md for rationale.

governance._note: Quorum is % of getPastTotalSupply = the full 100M minted at genesis, but most supply is vesting-locked/undelegated at launch (Substrate unlocks 10% at claim; Treasury 0%; Foundation 30%). Realistic delegatable float at launch is single-digit millions, so a high quorum bricks governance. quorumPercent=4 (= 4,000,000 votes at the 100M cap) is reachable with engagement; proposalThreshold 100k TNT is a spam floor that is not paralyzing on thin float. Conservative start: ratchet quorum up via governance as vesting unlocks over 3yr. Strongly pair with an independent CANCELLER_ROLE guardian Safe (see openDecisions); it is the real defense against a low-quorum capture proposal, not a high quorum. Alternatives: quorum 3% if early participation is weak, or 6% only once float deepens.

slashing._note: Drives Tangle.setSlashConfig. maxSlashBps 50% removes the buggy-blueprint full-slash foot-gun (governance can still authorize 100% per-service for equivocation). disputeBond prices spam disputes (refund-on-cancel, forfeit-on-execute). disputeResolutionDeadline 21d gives a >=3/5 multisig ~3x its 7d SLA before an honestly-disputed stake auto-executes (fail-open).

payments._note: Drives Tangle.setPaymentSplit (must sum to 10000 exactly). keeperBps 50 (carved from protocol 2000->1950) makes permissionless billSubscription EV-positive so the sole escrow-draw path has a keeper market. Run the protocol keeper bot from block 1 regardless.

_todo_guards: TODO: finalize guard policies (pauses, adapter requirements, delays). delegatorDelay/operatorDelay/bondLessDelay=0 means KEEP protocol defaults (28/56 rounds), not instant.

guards._todo_require_adapters: TODO: set true only once adapters exist for every ERC20 asset (otherwise ERC20 deposits revert)

migration._decision_headroom: DECIDED: true fixed-supply at the normalized 100,000,000 TNT target (= TangleToken.MAX_SUPPLY). From the OG snapshot (109.26M): (1) DROP the expired airdrop claims (~3.19M, 1-yr window expired) — not allocated; (2) reduce ONLY the Treasury bucket (~41.70M -> ~35.64M) to hit 100M. Active claimant buckets (Substrate 49.32M merkle, EVM 0, Foundation 15.04M) are untouched. The 9.26M reduction = 3.19M dropped-expired + 6.06M treasury-haircut. Genesis mints the entire 100M cap; MINTER_ROLE inert. Provenance + swappable distributions in deploy/distributions/ (raw-snapshot.json -> normalized-100m.json); reconcile.py enforces sum==100M.
migration._todo_allocations: TODO (Drew to confirm/finalize the canonical mainnet snapshot, then set deploy=true): live distribution = deploy/distributions/normalized-100m.json, from current packages/migration-claim outputs (merkle block 8116528). Substrate 49,322,182.84 (merkle totalValue) / EVM 0 (no active claims) / Foundation 15,040,809.83; Treasury = 100M - claims = 35,637,007.34 is the balancing bucket. Expired-unclaimed (~3.19M) is NOT allocated (decided — no decay). On any regen: recompute Treasury against 100M, mirror amounts here + into carveouts, pin merkleRoot + programVKey + sp1VerifierGateway, run reconcile.py, set deploy=true. The 100M total + MAX_SUPPLY never change.

credits._todo_owner: TODO: set to timelock/multisig that should manage credits epochs

_note_extras: Sections below drive deploy/deploy-all.sh (the prod orchestrator). FullDeploy itself does not read them; the orchestrator does, via jq, and runs the standalone subsystem scripts after core. Liquid vaults are turnkey; beacon + l2Slashing are cross-chain and require the operational inputs flagged below plus post-deploy timelock actions (see deploy/deploy-all.sh and deploy/RUNBOOK-launch.md).

liquidVaults._note: Deploys LiquidDelegationFactory once (staking from core manifest); vaults are created on demand. Owner handed to timelock.

beacon._note: Native-ETH restaking slash bridge. L1 (Ethereum) leg: ValidatorPodManager + EIP4788 oracle + L2SlashingConnector + BaseCrossChainMessenger. bridge=opstack uses Base's canonical L1CrossDomainMessenger — NATIVE, no third-party ISM/DVN to pin. Set deploy=true only when admin/oracle are real. Never enable USE_MOCK_BEACON_ORACLE on mainnet.
beacon._todo_admin: TODO: L1 pod-manager/connector owner — MUST be a multisig/timelock, not the deployer
beacon._todo_slashingOracle: TODO: off-chain beacon-slash watcher that calls propagateBeaconSlashing
beacon._note_l1CrossDomainMessenger: Base mainnet's canonical L1CrossDomainMessenger on Ethereum (the script defaults to this when blank); set explicitly for other OP chains.

l2Slashing._note: L2 (this chain) slash receiver + TangleL2Slasher. bridge=opstack uses the OP L2CrossDomainMessenger predeploy (0x42..07) and authenticates via xDomainMessageSender — no bridge adapter, no ISM/DVN. l1Messenger is the L1 BaseCrossChainMessenger (from the beacon manifest), NOT the connector. Post-deploy timelock actions: staking.addSlasher(TangleL2Slasher), +2-day activateOpStackL1Sender. See deploy/RUNBOOK-launch.md.
l2Slashing._todo_l1Connector: TODO: L2SlashingConnector from the beacon (L1) deploy manifest
l2Slashing._todo_l1Messenger: TODO: L1 BaseCrossChainMessenger from the beacon (L1) deploy manifest (the xDomainMessageSender on L2)
